item.title: Why are there so many EU/JP cars in the US, but not vice versa?
item.description: Oh, the US has some beautiful cars, not gonna lie, but in average US manufacturers don't give a fuck about non-US customers in their design, efficiency, sizing attempts and it shows. We don't drive huge ass pick up trucks which slurp 15L. Have you seen our gas prices? Or streets and parking spaces? Our excellent public transportation systems, bicycle and train infrastructure? The trump admin is high on their own farts.
item.dc:creator: B0reas

item.title: I am sorry the world never got to see the woman you would have become.
item.description: It's been over 2 years since breianna ghey was murdered. And yet people still use the wrong pronouns. You can not tell me these people have any empathy. Disgusting animals who are such cowards they attack a murdered child.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: What Happened Today #66
item.description: Cripple the system, then blame the wreck. Trump’s team is torching the machinery of public trust by gagging science, gutting safety hotlines, and cutting off cancer patients mid-treatment. They’re not just breaking government. They’re rewriting history while doing it. Think again if you think it’s all accidental. It’s a playbook: silence the experts, centralize the power, then dare anyone to call it what it is. Call your reps. Tell them this is not transparency. It’s sabotage. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/06/trump-says-he-doesnt-want-stocks-to-go-down-but-sometimes-you-have-to-take-medicine.html 2. https://www.fox4news.com/news/texas-measles-rfk-jr-funeral 3. https://www.msn.com/en-ie/news/world/ukraine-will-send-a-team-to-the-us-next-week-for-talks-on-a-new-draft-mineral-deal/ar-AA1CoyjG 4. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/nation/2025/04/06/maryland-deportation-kilmar-abrego-garcia-case/82968566007/ 5. https://www.msn.com/en-us/health/other/nih-scientists-have-a-cancer-breakthrough-layoffs-are-delaying-it/ar-AA1Co50C 6. https://www.cnn.com/2025/04/06/us/national-parks-underground-railroad-harriet-tubman/index.html 7. https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5235016-johnson-strikes-deal-luna-parental-proxy-voting/ 8. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/06/signal-group-chat-leak-how-it-happened 9. https://www.axios.com/2025/04/06/hhs-cuts-food-safety-services-disrupted 10. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/live-updates/trump-admin-live-updates-trump-automakers-make-lot/?id=120323605 11. https://www.mlive.com/public-interest/2025/04/canadian-government-behind-anti-tariff-billboard-ads-in-michigan.html
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Time Lapse Of The Famous Levanter Cloud Flowing Over The Rock Of Gibraltar
item.description: The Levanter is an Easterly wind experienced in the Western Mediterranean. When the wind blows from the Alboran Channel and through the Straits of Gibraltar, the moisture condenses over the Rock Of Gibraltar, to form a long spectacular white 'banner cloud'. Song used: "Both Sides Now" by Joni Mitchell (1966) #rocks #nature #awesome #weather #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust
